'''habala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zamia|zamia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zamia|zamia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| habala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæbælæth|hæbælæth]] || [[word:hæbælæj|hæbælæj]] || [[word:hæbælæsh|hæbælæsh]] || [[word:hæbælæ|hæbælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hababalath|hababalath]] || [[word:hababalaj|hababalaj]] || [[word:hababalash|hababalash]] || [[word:hababala|hababala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:habalath|habalath]] || [[word:habalaj|habalaj]] || [[word:habalash|habalash]] || [[word:habala|habala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:habaflath|habaflath]] || [[word:habaflaj|habaflaj]] || [[word:habaflash|habaflash]] || [[word:habaflaf|habaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:habalatha|habalatha]] || [[word:habalaja|habalaja]] || [[word:habalasha|habalasha]] || [[word:habalaka|habalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:habalath|habalath]] || [[word:habalaj|habalaj]] || [[word:habalash|habalash]] || [[word:habala|habala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:habalathal|habalathal]] || [[word:habalajal|habalajal]] || [[word:habalashal|habalashal]] || [[word:habalakal|habalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:habalathatha|habalathatha]] || [[word:habalajaja|habalajaja]] || [[word:habalashasha|habalashasha]] || [[word:habalaka|habalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:habalathan|habalathan]] || [[word:habalajan|habalajan]] || [[word:habalashan|habalashan]] || [[word:habalakan|habalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:habalathaoro|habalathaoro]] || [[word:habalajaoro|habalajaoro]] || [[word:habalashaoro|habalashaoro]] || [[word:habalakaoro|habalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
